Resumen

Varna es una ciudad en Varna con una población de 335,854. Bulgaria’s maritime capital and third-largest city, a popular Black Sea resort with a beautiful seaside garden, Roman baths, and a vibrant summer atmosphere.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
